idea-plugin.name: GitHub Dark Colorblind Islands
idea-plugin.description:
GitHub Dark Colorblind inspired theme adapted for JetBrains IDEs with the Islands parent theme.
The palette follows GitHub's Dark Colorblind / Primer color tokens and maps success to blue, danger to orange, strings to light blue, functions and variables to purple, and entities to orange. Includes a no-italic variant for users who prefer upright comments and bold-only keywords.
